name: Baiyin Nonferrous Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Baiyin Nonferrous Group Co., Ltd. engages in the mining, smelting, processing, and trading of various non-ferrous metals in China. It offers copper, lead, zinc, gold, silver, and cadmium ingots; zinc and lead-based alloys; and sulfuric acid, selenium dioxide, and other metal products. The company was founded in 1954 and is based in Baiyin, China.
